Thanks for contributing to sharktopus. Please fill this template so reviewers
can understand the change quickly. If this is a trivial fix (typo, docstring),
feel free to delete sections that don't apply.
-->

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing behavior changes or is removed)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Tests / CI only

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Which tests exercise the change? -->

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Added / updated tests cover the change
- [ ] Docs / CHANGELOG updated if user-visible
